introSection: Montaña Rusa was a Schwarzkopf sit down roller coaster that was located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened in 1973 as Mountain Express at Six Flags Magic Mountain. It operated until 1982 and was located on the plot of land where the now-defunct Flashback later stood. From there it was relocated to Magic Landing as "Wildcat". It was once again, relocated to Bosque Mágico as "Montaña Rusa".

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and yellow supports. It used to feature red track and cyan supports.

fullText:
Montaña Rusa was a Schwarzkopf sit down roller coaster that was located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA.

The ride opened in 1973 as Mountain Express at Six Flags Magic Mountain. It operated until 1982 and was located on the plot of land where the now-defunct Flashback later stood. From there it was relocated to Magic Landing as "Wildcat". It was once again, relocated to Bosque Mágico as "Montaña Rusa".



Red track and yellow supports. It used to feature red track and cyan supports.
